name: Anti-delete messages
description: Prevents deleted messages from being removed locally.

name: Anti-delete messages
description: Prevents deleted messages from being removed locally.

name: Anti-disappearing media
description: Keeps view-once and self-destructing media viewable forever.

name: Anti-disappearing media
description: Keeps view-once and self-destructing media viewable forever.

name: Anti-screenshot notification
description: Blocks screenshot notifications from being sent to the other user.

name: Bypass channel restrictions
description: Allows copying text, saving media, and opening blocked channels. Forwarding is server-side blocked and won't work.

name: Bypass channel restrictions
description: Allows opening copyrighted, sensitive, and temporarily disabled channels.

name: Bypass content restrictions
description: Allows saving from restricted channels.

name: Bypass integrity
description: Bypasses integrity check to allow login on patched app.

name: Bypass integrity
description: Bypasses integrity check to allow login on patched app.

name: Bypass signature check
description: Bypasses app signature verification to allow API access.

name: CREX Premium
description: Unlocks premium features and removes ads.

name: Cricbuzz Disable Ads
description: Removes all ads including banner, interstitial, video, and app open ads.

name: Cricbuzz Premium
description: Unlocks premium features like live streaming and premium articles.

name: Disable analytics
description: Blocks all analytics and tracking.

name: Disable auto update
description: Disables automatic app update checks.

name: Disable auto update
description: Disables automatic app update checks.

name: Disable telemetry
description: Blocks all telemetry, analytics, and observability data collection.

name: Disable telemetry
description: Disables AppStartTracker and other telemetry points.

name: Disable update check
description: Disables the in-app update check.

name: Doc Scanner Premium
description: Unlocks all premium features, removes ads, and enables pro themes.

name: Download speed boost
description: Increases download chunk size and max concurrent requests.

name: Enable all codecs
description: Enables all video codecs (H265, VP9, AV1) and 4K resolution by bypassing blacklist and capability checks.

name: Enable screen mirroring
description: Allows playback while screen mirroring or HDMI is connected.

name: Enable screenshots
description: Removes screenshot and screen recording restrictions.

name: Eyecon Premium
description: Unlocks premium features.

name: Fing Premium
description: Unlocks premium network tools and features.

name: Force HDR10
description: Forces HDR10 and HDR10+ playback on compatible devices by bypassing blacklist and capability checks.

name: GMS sign-in bypass
description: Forces SMS-based OTP verification instead of GMS SmsRetriever, fixing sign-in on re-signed APKs.

name: Hide Assistant tab
description: Hides the Assistant tab from the bottom navigation bar.

name: Hide Family Protection button
description: Hides the Family Protection button from the bottom navigation bar.

name: Hide Premium from settings
description: Hides the Premium options from the settings and user details pages.

name: Hide Premium tab
description: Hides the Premium tab from the bottom navigation bar.

name: Hide Scams tab
description: Hides the Scams tab from the bottom navigation bar.

name: Hide typing indicator
description: Prevents typing status from being sent to other users.

name: Hide typing indicator
description: Hides your typing indicator from other users.

name: Lumina Premium
description: Unlocks all premium wallpapers and categories.

name: MacroDroid Premium
description: Unlocks premium features and removes macro limits.

name: Mark Premium
description: Unlocks premium features and removes ads.

name: Morolingo Premium
description: Unlocks premium features in the Morolingo Darija & Amazigh learning app. Bypasses Pairip license check, RevenueCat entitlement check, and Superwall paywall.

name: MX Player Pro License
description: Bypasses license verification and signature checks in MX Player Pro.

name: Neutralize third-party SDKs
description: Disables telemetry, ad, and tracking SDK initializations. Fixes #84.

name: Plus Premium
description: Unlocks premium feature UI and shows premium badge on self only.

name: Premium unlock
description: Unlocks premium UI features, removes subscription nudges, and enables downloads.

name: Proton VPN Premium
description: Unlocks premium UI features: removes upsells, enables NetShield ad-blocker, hides upgrade prompts, shows free servers with premium interface (Plus badge, no speed limits display, all feature flags enabled).

name: Remove ads
description: Removes pre-roll, mid-roll, and live match video ads.

name: Remove ads
description: Removes all ads including Plus banner ads and Telegram sponsored messages.

name: Remove ads
description: Removes sponsored messages and video ads.

name: StarSense Unlock
description: Bypasses the unlock code check to enable all features.

name: Telegram Premium
description: Unlocks premium features.

name: Teleprompter Premium

name: TickTick Premium

description: Unlocks premium features.

name: Truecaller Premium

name: Unlock Premium

name: Unlock Pro
